entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary cereal crop studied for its response to phosphorus in West Africa

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where the study is focused and where highly weathered soils are prevalent

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A critical plant nutrient whose availability determines sorghum performance and yield

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of crop productivity, including grain and vegetative yield

entities.name: HIGHLY WEATHERED SOILS
entities.description: Soils in West Africa characterized by low plant-available phosphorus

entities.name: CLIMATE
entities.description: Environmental factor that influences crop variability

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the harvested grain per unit area

entities.name: CROP DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of growth and maturation of the crop

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The physical increase in plant biomass over time

entities.name: MECHANISTIC MODELS
entities.description: Models that integrate physiological processes to understand crop responses

entities.name: P-UPTAKE
entities.description: The process and rate at which a plant absorbs phosphorus from the soil

entities.name: P MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing phosphorus levels in the soil to optimize crop yield

entities.name: SOIL-PLANT P MODEL
entities.description: A generic module developed to simulate the interaction between soil phosphorus and plant uptake

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEM MODEL
entities.description: The CSM component of the DSSAT framework

entities.name: DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM FOR AGROTECHNOLOGY TRANSFER
entities.description: A software framework (DSSAT) used for simulating crop growth and management

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop on which the soil-plant P module was previously tested

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop on which the soil-plant P module was previously tested

entities.name: P CONCENTRATIONS
entities.description: The measured amount of phosphorus within plant tissues

entities.name: DRY WEIGHTS
entities.description: The mass of plant organs after water removal

entities.name: MATURITIES
entities.description: The time taken for the crop to reach physiological maturity

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD SENSITIVITIES
entities.description: The response of the crop to the length of day/night cycles

entities.name: HIGH-P
entities.description: Soil conditions with high availability of phosphorus

entities.name: P-DEFICIENT SOILS
entities.description: Soil conditions with low availability of phosphorus

entities.name: ICRISAT-MALI
entities.description: The research site in Mali where the field experiments were conducted

entities.name: CERES-SORGHUM
entities.description: A specific crop model used to simulate sorghum growth

entities.name: P MODULE
entities.description: The specific phosphorus module coupled with CERES-Sorghum

entities.name: VEGETATIVE YIELD
entities.description: The yield of the non-grain parts of the plant

relationships.target: DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM FOR AGROTECHNOLOGY TRANSFER
